title: Worker Git push auth is ready
description: Verifies the worker repo can authenticate a dry-run push through origin using the repo-aware Git askpass helper.
command:
set -euo pipefail
WORK_TARGET='{{workTarget}}'
TARGET_PATH='{{targetPath}}'
ASKPASS_PATH='/home/ec2-user/.config/agent-github/git-askpass.sh'
work-at "$WORK_TARGET" bash -lc "test -x '$ASKPASS_PATH'"
BRANCH="$(work-at "$WORK_TARGET" bash -lc "cd '$TARGET_PATH' && git branch --show-current")"
if [ -z "$BRANCH" ]; then
  echo "worker git branch is empty" >&2
  exit 1
fi
work-at "$WORK_TARGET" bash -lc "cd '$TARGET_PATH' && git push --dry-run origin '$BRANCH' >/tmp/dashboard-worker-git-push-auth-ready.out 2>&1"
work-at "$WORK_TARGET" bash -lc "tail -n 20 /tmp/dashboard-worker-git-push-auth-ready.out"
